# hooks-auth-send-verification-email

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for sendVerificationEmail

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useSendVerificationEmailMutation(); mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useSendVerificationEmailMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useSendVerificationEmailMutation();
mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```
